title: stenactis annua subsp. septentrionalis
intro: Stenactis annua subsp. septentrionalis, also known as the northern or autumnal wormwood, is a subspecies of the Stenactis annua plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains camphor and borneol, compounds known for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stenactis annua subsp. septentrionalis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antispasmodic and antiseptic effects. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
